method: authenticated browser UI (institutional: University of the Cumberlands); per-title probe lookups run one-at-a-time with delays; no bulk export, no CAPTCHA bypass.

registration_query.query: ("Abstract":"Large Language Model" OR "Abstract":LLM) AND ("Abstract":Agent OR "Abstract":Autonomous) AND ("All Metadata":Evaluation OR "All Metadata":Benchmark)
registration_query.field_scoping: honored (Abstract + All Metadata field codes accepted by IEEE query syntax)

ieee_xplore.probe_note: All probe queries return only works CITING the benchmarks; IEEE Xplore hosts none of the 10 canonical benchmark papers (they are arXiv / ACL / NeurIPS / ICLR).

registration_query.query_intended: Abstract:("Large Language Model" OR "LLM") AND Abstract:(Agent OR Autonomous) AND Keyword:(Evaluation OR Benchmark)
registration_query.query_as_executed: [[All: 'large language model'] OR [All: llm]] AND [[All: agent] OR [All: autonomous]] AND [[All: evaluation] OR [All: benchmark]] AND [E-Publication Date: 01/01/2023 TO 06/30/2026]
registration_query.field_scoping_evidence: ACM URL interface degraded Abstract:/Keyword: field codes to All-field (page title shows [All: ...] for every clause). The count is therefore an over-broad all-field count, NOT the field-restricted count, exactly as the protocol anticipated.

acm_dl.probe_note: All-field probes return surveys and derivative works citing the benchmarks; ACM DL hosts none of the 10 canonical benchmark papers themselves.

ieee.top: AutoGen-TraceKit: Process-Aware Evaluation of LLM Agents

acm.top: Survey of Emerging Trends in LLM Agent Benchmarking
Wily: High-Performance Complexity Gated-Feedback for AI Coding Agents
DeepAgent: A General Reasoning Agent with Scalable Toolsets
AgentFixer: From Failure Detection to Fix Recommendations

ieee.top: BEAP-Agent: Backtrackable Execution and Adaptive Planning for GUI Agents

acm.top: Survey of Emerging Trends in LLM Agent Benchmarking
Survey of Emerging Trends in LLM Agent Benchmarking
LLMs for Constructing and Optimizing ML Workflows: A Survey

ieee.top: Selective Memory Sharing in Multi-Agent LLM Teams via AgentGym-RL

acm.top: AgentGen: Enhancing Planning Abilities for LLM-based Agent
Cross-View Consistency Checking for Multimodal Web Agents

ieee.top: CAPRI-DP: Differentially Private Extension to Context-Aware Multi-Agent Privacy

acm.top: Agentic AI in Healthcare: Opportunities, Challenges

interpretation.key_finding: Adding IEEE Xplore (962 field-scoped) and ACM DL (17231 broad_expansion) to the source union leaves the probe gap at 0: OpenAlex still contains every probe benchmark that any source hosts. Both commercial DBs index a large derivative/citing literature but none of the canonical benchmark papers themselves, which are published on arXiv/ACL/NeurIPS/ICLR.
interpretation.capture_recapture: Declined for both: probe overlap m=0 on the probe set and same-population assumption violated (these DBs do not host this literature class). Marked UNRESOLVED:zero_overlap_same_population_violated.
interpretation.label: estimate-supporting evidence; probe columns verified via live authenticated UI
